# CWE-565: role cookie validated against signed server session before delete.
lang: go
file: CWE-565-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

func DeleteTenant(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	roleCookie, err := c.Cookie("role")
	if err != nil {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	if roleCookie != c.GetString("role") {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	if c.GetString("role") != "admin" {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	db.Exec("DELETE FROM tenants WHERE id = ?", c.Param("id"))
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
